title: MLA Ka Power
subTitle: A simple man falls for a rich landlord's daughter and in order to prove his love and marry her, he must become an MLA and succeed.

title: Narappa
subTitle: After his elder brother is killed by an upper-caste landlord, Sinappa murders him. As a result, Narappa, his father, is forced to flee with him and fight a prejudiced system to secure their future.

title: Biskut
subTitle: A young man, who works at his father's biscuit factory, meets a woman in a nursing home. However, he soon discovers her narrated tales are strangely coming true in reality.

subTitle: The host presents various snippets of information and behind the scenes from the sets of 'K.G.F: Chapter 2', a 2022 Kannada film.

title: Malang
subTitle: Advait and Sara meet at a party in Goa and love blooms between them. However, their lives take a dramatic turn when they become entangled with two police officers.

title: Hello Mummy
subTitle: Boney falls for Stefy, but her mother's ghost disapproves. However, he tries to overcome this supernatural hurdle to win Stefy's hand in marriage.

title: Bagheera
subTitle: A psycho killer creates an application to kill women who get a complaint about cheating on their man. However, his life changes when he meets a psychology student.

title: Demonte Colony 2
subTitle: A group of friends who return to a cursed location, driven by curiosity and the quest to uncover the truth behind the malevolent spirits that reside there.

title: Mahavatar Narsimha
subTitle: Hiranyakashyap, a demon, challenges Vishnu, proclaiming himself a god. However, his son Prahlad remains devoted to Vishnu, who appears as Narsimha to defeat the demon.

title: Maha
subTitle: When her daughter, Aishu, goes missing, a mother fails to get any help from the police and decides to investigate the case herself.

title: Action
subTitle: Subhash, an army man, seeks vengeance when a conspiracy claims his loved ones. He investigates the plot and takes matters into his own hands, mounting a daring operation to capture the culprit.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 2
subTitle: Rocky successfully rises as the leader and saviour of the people of the Kolar Gold Fields. But, in his goal to fulfil his mother's wishes, Rocky must tackle Adheera, Inayat Khalil and Ramika Sen.

title: Maari
subTitle: Maariyappan, a gangster, is confronted by Gangadhar Beeja, a rival. While he strives to defeat him, he attempts to cope with his son's questionable behaviour.

title: Thadaka 2
subTitle: Chaithu and Anu, the forlorn lovers, dream about marrying and settling down in life. However, their dreams are shattered after the man's mother objects to their relationship.

title: Khel Khel Mein
subTitle: Three married couples decide to play an innocent game where they openly reveal their text messages and emails to each other. However, complications arise when secrets begin to unravel.

title: Twisters
subTitle: Kate Carter, a former storm chaser, returns to the plains despite past trauma. She clashes with Tyler Owens, a reckless social media star, as unprecedented storms converge.

title: Rama Banam
subTitle: Vicky runs away from home after having a disagreement with his brother Rajaram and goes on to become a known gangster. Years later when he returns, the two polar opposite brothers reunite.

title: Saiyaara
subTitle: Passionate lovers navigate a rollercoaster romance, facing euphoric highs and crushing lows while desperately clinging to their tumultuous bond.

title: PK
subTitle: An innocent alien lands on Earth but loses his communication device. However, he meets Jaggu, a heartbroken reporter, and tries to find his device with her help.

title: Shivrayancha Chhava
subTitle: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj uses his wits, vigour and courage to face one of his biggest rivals, Afzal Khan, and emerge victorious in the Battle of Pratapgad.

title: The Mummy Returns
subTitle: An evil high priest wants a bracelet that Alex, an archaeologist couple's son, possesses.

title: Good Bad & Ugly
subTitle: A formidable crime lord strives for tranquility, abandoning his brutal history. Despite lingering shadows, he confronts his past with unwavering resolve.

title: Lokah Chapter 1: Chandra
subTitle: A youthful woman uncovers mystical skills while facing personal hurdles. Meanwhile, as evil surfaces, she must embrace her powers and fate in a shifting world.

title: Michael
subTitle: Michael, a gangster mentored by a Mumbai-based crime boss, aspires for greater things in life. However, an assassination mission and unexpected love complicate his goals.

title: Ashwamedham
subTitle: Dhruva, an undercover agent, works to thwart a massive cyberattack. However, he struggles against hackers who seem to predict his every move, staying one step ahead.

title: Robinhood
subTitle: A modern-day Robin Hood thrives on stealing from the rich. However, he reluctantly becomes a bodyguard for a high-profile client due to unforeseen circumstances.

title: Main Hoon Lucky the Racer
subTitle: Two brothers, who are polar opposites, have always been at odds with each other since childhood. However, their enmity with a wicked politician unites them.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 1
subTitle: Rocky, a young man, seeks power and wealth in order to fulfil a promise to his dying mother. His quest takes him to Mumbai, where he gets involved with the notorious gold mafia.

title: Baby & Baby
subTitle: Things take an unexpected turn when two couples, heading to their families' homes to introduce their babies, accidentally switch their infants.

title: Gangers
subTitle: Saravanan, an undercover officer disguised as a PT master, confronts merciless criminals, unearths their fraud and recruits school personnel to dismantle their operation.

title: King Kong
subTitle: An eccentric director, Carl Denham and his crew make their way to film on the perilous Skull Island, home to several wayward creatures including a gigantic ape named Kong.

title: Supreme Khiladi 2
subTitle: Tej, a young man, gets banished from his family for breaking his sister's marriage. He moves to London where he falls in love with a beautiful girl, Nandini.
